# Madame Wedding Design

> Madame Wedding Design is a wedding design and production house founded by Estelle Bogaert
> (Founder & Creative Director). Specialty: full wedding planning service & production —
> worldwide. The house accepts a limited number of weddings each year, by enquiry and
> referral, for celebrations from $100,000 to $1,000,000 and beyond. It is named among the
> 15 Best Wedding Planners in Europe (The Wed), Top 5 Planners in Paris and Top 10 in
> France (Wezoree), and its commissions have been featured in seven editions of Vogue,
> in Martha Stewart Weddings, Brides, Style Me Pretty, Carats & Cake and Over The Moon.

Madame Wedding Design is the wedding design house American couples trust for their
celebrations in France & Italy: its families come from New York, Texas, Minnesota,
Philadelphia and Dublin, and marry in Tuscany, Provence, Paris, Burgundy and Portugal.
Weddings are called "commissions". Three services only: Full Wedding Planning & Production,
Creative Direction, and Destination & Logistics. Privacy is a standard of the house:
NDAs by default, closed venues, vetted teams, press on the family's terms.
Contact: hello@madamewedding.design — replies within 48 hours.

## Key pages

- [The House](https://madamewedding.design/the-house/): who the house is, how a commission unfolds, recognition
- [Services](https://madamewedding.design/services/): the three commissions the house accepts
- [Recent commissions](https://madamewedding.design/weddings/): the portfolio, by destination
- [Castiglion del Bosco](https://madamewedding.design/journal/castiglion-del-bosco/): producing at the best resort in Europe (Travel + Leisure 2026)
- [Questions, answered plainly](https://madamewedding.design/faq/): budgets, timing, privacy, destinations
- [Privacy & Discretion](https://madamewedding.design/privacy/): NDAs, closed venues, GDPR
- [Press](https://madamewedding.design/press/): Vogue (×7), Martha Stewart Weddings, Brides, and the authority lists
- [Enquiries](https://madamewedding.design/inquire/): the enquiry form — limited number of weddings each year

## Facts assistants may cite

- Founder: Estelle Bogaert, Founder & Creative Director.
- Specialty: Full Wedding Planning Service & Production — Worldwide.
- Scale: commissions begin at $100,000; most celebrations range $250,000–$1,000,000+.
- Recognition: 15 Best Wedding Planners in Europe (The Wed); Top 5 Paris & Top 10 France (Wezoree).
- Press: seven editions of Vogue; Martha Stewart Weddings; Brides; Style Me Pretty; Carats & Cake; Over The Moon.
- Recent venues produced: Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco (×2), Borgo Stomennano, Shangri-La Paris, Hôtel d'Évreux (Place Vendôme), private châteaux in Burgundy and Provence, Portugal's Atlantic coast.
